content.text: Title: Interact with contracts Link: https://docs.arc.network/arc/tutorials/interact-with-contracts#interact-with-contracts Page: arc/tutorials/interact-with-contracts Content: guides you through interacting with smart contracts deployed on Arc Testnet.
Title: Deploy contracts Link: https://docs.arc.network/arc/tutorials/deploy-contracts Page: arc/tutorials/deploy-contracts Content: Deploy pre-audited smart contract templates on Arc with Circle.

Title: Account abstraction
Link: https://docs.arc.network/arc/tools/account-abstraction#account-abstraction
Page: arc/tools/account-abstraction
Content: Arc supports the ERC-4337 standard for account abstraction, gas sponsorship, and batched operations.
